nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Olive sunbird
nodes.summary: Olive sunbird（Olive sunbird，学名 Cyanomitra olivacea），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: |date=2020 |title=Olive Sunbird (Cyanomitra olivacea), version 1.0 |url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/eaosun1/cur/introduction |journal=Birds of the World |language=en |doi=10.2173/bow.eaosun1.01 |issn=2771-3105|url-access=subscription }} It has a large distribution that spans across central Africa from western countries including Senegal, Guinea, and Angola towards eastern countries including Ethiopia, Kenya, and Mozambique. This range also extends to southern African countries including South Africa and Zimbabwe. It is mainly nectarivorous and lives in a variety of forest, scrubland, and modified habitats
